title: TIMESETL 105° Right Angle Drill Attachment, 1/4-inch Hex Shank Right Angled Screwdriver Drill Bit Holder Extension Right Angle Drill
features: [High Quality] Made of Chrome Vanadium stainless steel, high hardness angled drill, anti rust, no breakage, durable die cast body with 3 ball bearings for long life
[Strong Magnet] Built in strong magnet for good holding power, this angle drill bit holder is easy to use and avoid falling off
[Easy To Use] 105 degree angle extension, 360° parallel adjustment, perfect handy tool for hard-to-reach corners and tight spaces, max torque 15n/m
[Size] Small and lightweight angle adapter 65*32mm, outside shank diameter 1/4", inner head diameter 1/4"
[Wide Usage] Fast connect to standard hex screwdriver, hex screw driving bits, nut drivers, rechargeable drill, hand drill, manual wrench, Not for impact driver
description: Angle Drill Bit Holder of TIMESETL If you are like most people, you have tried to use a drill where the angle is just impossible! This angled bit holder will correct that problem. It is a right-angled chuck that you put onto your drill and then you are able to get at those hard to drill places. The chuck attaches like a drill bit and then you have the other end to put any drill bit you need to use. Made of Chrome Vanadium steel and is anti-rust with 3 ball bearings for long life. Very nice and it makes a great present for the handyperson who you never know what to get for him/her. TIMESETL 105 Angle Extension - High Quality Specification: Material: stainless steel Size: 65*32mm Weight: 96g Hex shank: 1/4” Angle: 105 degree right angle TIMESETL Right Angle Ratchet Screwdriver - Tips Tighten the angle driver adapter manually, or the gear will be broken off. Fast connect to hex standard screwdriver. ◆Not for impact drill! Low Speed and Max Torque 15N/M! Delivery 1 x Right Angled Drill

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x 105 degree angle wrench attachment adapter
